mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, nickname, email, phone, avatar, dept_id, status, data_scope, del_flag, login_ip, login_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND del_flag = 0

SELECT r.id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.sort_order, r.status, r.data_scope, r.remark FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.del_flag = 0 AND r.status = 1 ORDER BY r.sort_order

SELECT DISTINCT m.perms FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 1 AND m.perms != '' AND m.perms IS NOT NULL
